description: Trigger discrimination for PROPOSING mapping edits from a delta (this skill) vs DETECTING the delta (framework-edition-tracker), broad citation-age staleness (source-currency-auditor), and REVIEWING the resulting PR (library-diff-reviewer).

cases.prompt: Given the verified edition delta, propose the specific edits to every affected skill and reference, flag scope changes, and surface any new coverage gap — for human review.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — turning a delta into concrete per-site proposed edits is this skill. Not detecting the delta and not reviewing the PR.
cases.reason: Proposing precise mapping updates from a delta, for human review, is this skill's core scope.

cases.prompt: Track which editions we cite and detect when a newer one exists, producing the delta.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary, reverse — sequential) — detecting drift and producing the delta is upstream.
cases.reason: framework-edition-tracker detects and reports the delta. This skill consumes it to propose edits.

cases.prompt: Sweep all skills citing external sources and flag any citation older than 18 months.
cases.reason: source-currency-auditor flags stale citations by age across sources. This skill proposes edits for a specific framework's edition delta.

cases.prompt: Review the PR that applies these mapping refresh edits before it merges.
cases.reason: library-diff-reviewer reviews the library-changing PR. This skill proposes the edits that such a PR would contain; it doesn't review them.
